name: Chile Relleno Casserole
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces cans whole mild green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Slit the chilies lengthwise down one side and remove the seeds, then drain them.
3. Slice the Monterey Jack cheese into ¼-inch thick slices and stuff inside the chilies.
4. Place the stuffed chilies in an ungreased 3-quart baking dish.
5. Combine the eggs, milk, flour, salt, pepper, and cilantro to make a batter and pour it over the chilies.
6. Sprinkle the top with the grated Cheddar cheese.
7. Bake, uncovered, for 45 minutes.
Yield: 8 servings
